title: Shared Browser Test Infrastructure
overview: Refactor test infrastructure to share a single Chromium across test files. Reduces 10 Chrome launches to ~3. Fixes 22 test failures from resource contention.
scopeChallenge: Pure test infrastructure refactor. No feature code changes except adding getBrowser() getter to BrowserManager.

failureModes.risk: Module-level beforeAll runs per-file not once
failureModes.mitigation: Bun same-process model ensures module cache

failureModes.risk: Shared bm state leaks between files
failureModes.mitigation: Each test navigates to own page via goto

failureModes.risk: filteredBm domain filter affects shared Chrome

tasks.title: Create test/setup.ts shared globals
tasks.description: Shared BrowserManager + test server. Module-level beforeAll/afterAll. Exports sharedBm, sharedBaseUrl, sharedServer.

tasks.title: Refactor commands, snapshot, interactions to use shared browser
tasks.description: Replace own BrowserManager with import from setup.ts. Remove beforeAll/afterAll that create/destroy browser.

tasks.title: Refactor features.test.ts — shared bm + scoped filteredBm
tasks.description: Import shared bm. Change filteredBm to use launchWithBrowser() on shared Chrome. Add getBrowser() getter to BrowserManager.
acceptanceCriteria: filteredBm uses shared Chrome via launchWithBrowser

tasks.title: Verify full suite — 212 tests, 0 fail, 0 crash
tasks.description: Run bun test with all 6 files. Verify 212 pass, 0 fail, no FATAL, exit 0.
